- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	Project is a DIY audio portfolio website with plain HTML/CSS/JavaScript featuring Productions, Mixing, and Mastering pages with A/B audio comparison and blend slider.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	Created complete project structure with:
	- 4 HTML pages (index, productions, mixing, mastering)
	- Professional CSS styling with dark theme
	- JavaScript modules for portfolio management and audio comparison
	- Directory structure for assets (audio, images, css, js)

- [x] Customize the Project
	Implemented all requested features:
	- Responsive navigation across all pages
	- Portfolio card system with metadata and external links
	- Interactive A/B audio comparison on mastering page
	- Blend slider for smooth mixing to master transition
	- Synchronized audio playback between versions
	- Professional dark theme with modern design

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	No extensions required for static HTML/CSS/JavaScript site.

- [x] Compile the Project
	Project is static HTML/CSS/JavaScript - no compilation needed.

- [x] Create and Run Task
	Project ready to run. Use local server for best results:
	`python3 -m http.server 8000` or `php -S localhost:8000`
	Then visit http://localhost:8000

- [x] Launch the Project
	Site is ready to open. Can be viewed directly in browser or served locally.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	✅ README.md created with comprehensive documentation
	✅ Project structure documented
	✅ Customization guide provided
	✅ Audio comparison feature explained
	✅ Deployment instructions included
	✅ Troubleshooting section added
